mapper.sql: id, role_name, role_key, sort_order, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role ( role_name, role_key, sort_order, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{roleName}, #{roleKey}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_role
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, role_name = #{roleName}, role_key = #{roleKey}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
